text:
いやーお疲れ様！
今回は、ありがと！

どうもどうもー！
依頼品、受け取りましたー！
おっつかれさまー！

受け取りましたー！
依頼、受けてくれてありがとね！

Hey, great job!
Thanks for your help with this!

Thank you, thank you!
Goods duly received!
Grrreat job!

Duly received!
Thank you for taking care of this!

いやーお疲れ様！
こんなに上手いなんて思わなかった！
ありがとね、助かったよ！

予想外も予想外！
依頼以上の品をありがと！
次もよろしくね！

すっごいね！　いやーすっごい！
これぞ、最高傑作！
アナタに頼んでよかった！

Hey, great job!
I didn't expect things to go so smoothly!
Thank you, you've been a great help!

Expectations: blown out!
This is even better than I could have expected.
I'll be counting on you in the future!

Excellent! Simply amazing!
You are a true professional!
I'm so glad I could count on you!
